## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly performance review and content strategy discussion for Teero's dental industry blog.](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance remains strong with 63 clicks (slight dip) and increased impressions](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [17 new articles published, 8 more pending; new writer (Axel) onboarded](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Focusing on AI, patient booking/reminders, and dental insurance topics for future content](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Transitioning blog management to Teero's Airtable (slightly delayed)](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance

  - [63 clicks this week (vs. 79 last week); slight dip but not concerning](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
  - [Increased impressions compared to previous week](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=43.0)
  - [Even distribution of clicks across articles, not concentrated on 1-2 pieces](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Top performers: dental office/management topics, appointment reminder templates](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [AI-related content (e.g., appointment reminders) performing well, aligning with Teero's product roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

### Content Production & Strategy

  - [17 new articles published, 8 more to be published within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [New writer (Axel) onboarded; Nate to provide feedback on quality](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Implementing resource categories: "Resources for Dental Practices" and "Resources for Dental Hygienists"](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Experimenting with educational content for dental hygienists (e.g., oral health, vitamin D)](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Future focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
    1.  AI in dentistry
    2.  Patient booking, appointment reminders, no-shows
    3.  Dental insurance topics (e.g., how many to accept, communicating costs to patients)
    4.  Medicare for dental practices

### Blog Management Transition

  - [Moving blog management to Teero's Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Transition slightly delayed; Aida to follow up with Daniel for completion by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Hiring Update

  - [Teero seeking Ops Manager in Amsterdam (relocation possible)](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Role involves process optimization, analytics, and scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Aida to review network for potential candidates](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to publish remaining 8 articles within 1-2 days](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Nate to provide feedback on new writer Axel's content quality](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Aida to follow up with Daniel re: Airtable transition completion](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Aida to conduct additional content research focusing on AI, patient booking, and dental insurance topics](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Nate to share job listing for Amsterdam Ops Manager role with Aida](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Aida to review network for potential Ops Manager candidates](https://fathom.video/share/U_jipx5kvDYogeEk2udcqQdvYgw3XLcc?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
